name: Task Input Smoke Check
description: Minimal pipeline for verifying run-level taskTitle/taskPrompt injection.

nodes.name: Task Echo
Task Verify
nodes.prompt:
You are the second node in a run-input smoke pipeline. Read the upstream node output appended below this prompt. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# Task Input Verification
TITLE_SEEN: <copied task title>
TASK_SEEN: <copied task text>
CHAINING: OK if both the task title and task text are present, otherwise FAILED
SOURCE_STATUS: <copied source status>
